Name: Breadboard
Purpose: To test if the components all do their assigned function before putting them in the case.

Name: Keycaps
Purpose: To allow the project to have a more aesthetic look and protect wear and tear of the tactile switches.

Name: Dupont Cables
Purpose: To connect the LCD screen and the ESP32 to display the code.

Name: LCD Screen
Purpose: To display the code of the program such as show the current song.

Name: ESP32 Board
Purpose: To run the code of the project.

Name: Tactile Keyboard Switches
Purpose: They allow you to interact with the display.
